name: Motrix Page Scraper
description: Detects HTML download pages and rewrites the URL to the archive link they reference.
settings.title: Page Scraper
settings.enabled.title: Enabled
settings.enabled.desc: Scan download pages and rewrite the URL to the archive link they reference.
settings.maxBodyBytes.title: Max page size
settings.maxBodyBytes.desc: Largest HTML page (in bytes) to download while scanning for an archive link.
